content.name: Tour Privado por París
content.description:
If you want to get to know Paris in the most comfortable and personal way, with a guide at your complete disposal, come with us to discover the most interesting corners of the city.
The guide will make an itinerary based on your tastes and preferences.

We will discover Paris quietly, with time to take photos, buy souvenirs and have lunch in a restaurant of your choice. It will be a unique tour in which our guide will also tell you details and curiosities about local Parisian life.

In our standard itinerary we will see the most important monuments and attractions of Paris: Notre Dame Cathedral, Latin Quarter, Seine River, Pont Neuf, Pont des Arts, Louvre Museum pyramid, Opéra Garnier, Tuileries Garden, Champs Elysées, Arc de Triomphe, Pont Alexandre III, Eiffel Tower, Île de la Cité, Place Vendôme, Montmartre, Sacré-Coeur Basilica, Moulin Rouge...


\nRedeem information
Voucher type: Printed and e-Voucher
Printed voucher or E-voucher. Print and bring the voucher or show the voucher on your mobile device to enjoy the activity.

Location
Start point:
Exit metro Cité (Line 4), Place Louis Lépine
Please ensure you arrive at the meeting point at least 15 minutes before the scheduled departure time.

End point: Same as the starting point

Guide options
Guide type: Guide

Requirements
Please make sure you answer all the mandatory questions during the booking process.

Recommendations
As this tour involves a fair amount of walking, please wear comfortable shoes.\n
